hull_structure.notes: Sections: nose-cap, fwd-belly, mid-belly, aft-belly, dorsal-fwd, dorsal-aft

hull_structure.desc: Carbon fibre keel + ring frames (3K weave, 1.5mm)
PTFE conduit tubes ×6 — permanent cableway through foam
EPS void formers — temporary, removed after foam cure
hull_structure.notes: Consumable — Foamular 150, waxed, 7 zone formers for 8 node bays

hull_structure.desc: Johnson's Paste Wax — void former release agent
CF tube spar — nacelle stub arm structural core
Access panel frames + lids PETG — panels A–F
hull_structure.notes: A: bayonet-nose, B: M2.5 dorsal-fwd, C: hinge-belly, D: magnet dorsal-aft, E: M2.5 aft, F: bayonet engine-bell

hull_structure.desc: M2.5×6 SS pan-head screws (panels B, E)
3M 4016 foam tape gasket — all panel perimeters
Bob Smith BSI-201 epoxy — frame bonding

propulsion.notes: Forward-flight transition thrust — 4S via balance tap from 6S main
Powers fuselage EDF from 6S main battery cells 1–4
Required for 84A XRP draw — do not substitute lower-rated ESC

nacelle_hardware.desc: Nacelle pod 93.5mm OD — budget EDF variant (Phases 2–6)
nacelle_hardware.notes: Print in Phase 0; used in Phases 2–6 with budget 80mm EDFs

nacelle_hardware.desc: Nacelle pod 83mm housing OD — XRP EDF variant (Phase 7+)
nacelle_hardware.notes: Print in Phase 0; swap in at Phase 7 pod upgrade

nacelle_hardware.desc: Port nacelle tip cap + WS2812C nav light (RED)
Starboard nacelle tip cap + WS2812C nav light (GREEN)
CF stub arm — nacelle pivot mount
Tilt bracket PETG — servo horn to nacelle ring
nacelle_hardware.notes: Push-fit to MG90S servo horn, M2 locking screw

nacelle_hardware.desc: MG90S metal gear servo — nacelle tilt
Variable nozzle gear assembly — fuselage thrust vector
nacelle_hardware.notes: 3× nozzle petals driven by single SG90 servo

avionics_nodes.notes: FC1–FC4. AM6232 dual A53 + M4F + PRU-ICSS, 512MB LPDDR4, eMMC. Runs Cape-A sensor/flight-control cape.
CN1–CN4. Same SoC as FC nodes. Runs Cape-B comms/payload cape.

avionics_nodes.desc: Cape-A PCB 85×55mm 4L — Sensor + Flight Control cape
avionics_nodes.notes: ICM-42688-P IMU, BMP388 baro, M10Q GPS, ATA6561 CAN FD, MAX3485E RS-485, DS26LV31/32+xfmr 1553 PRU, DP83825I×2 ETH PHY, SLB9670 TPM2, 8×PWM servo rail, ESC telem UART. Stacks on PB2 P1/P2 headers.

avionics_nodes.desc: Cape-B PCB 90×60mm 4L — Comms + Logging + Payload cape
avionics_nodes.notes: SiK 915MHz, RFM95W LoRa, TI WL1837MOD WiFi/BT, RCRS-49 header, ATA6561 CAN FD, MAX3485E RS-485, DS26LV31/32+xfmr 1553 PRU, DP83825I×2 ETH PHY, SLB9670 TPM2, ATF16V8BQL CPLD write-blocker, microSD log slot, W25Q128JV NOR flash, DRV8833 winch, HX711 load cell, 2×servo cargo. Stacks on PB2 P1/P2 headers.

avionics_nodes.desc: RCRS-49 sub-module PCB — 49MHz TDDS RC transceiver
avionics_nodes.notes: 49MHz TDDS with dynamic channel assignment. Plugs into Cape-B 6-pin JST-GH header. Separate RF PCB with antenna SMA connector.
One per PB2 node. eMMC is primary boot; microSD is OS fallback and field-reprogram card.
One per Cape-B (CN nodes only). Write-blocked by Cape-B ATF16V8BQL CPLD latch — SET at power-on, CLEAR only on hard power cycle. Non-executable, append-only log.

avionics_nodes.desc: W25Q128JV 128Mbit SPI NOR flash — circular log buffer
avionics_nodes.notes: On Cape-B. Fast circular write buffer for high-rate sensor telemetry; offloaded to microSD at end of flight.

wiring.desc: Power distribution board — XT90 main + 3× ESC outputs + 5V BEC bus

wiring.notes: One BEC per 4-node group (FC + CN); redundant avionics rails

wiring.desc: 20AWG servo extension leads 300mm × 8 (8 PWM channels per FC node × 4 FC nodes — shared via bus arbitration)
wiring.notes: Tilt servos on FC1/FC4; nozzle servo on FC2
Linear bus: FC1→FC2→FC3→FC4→CN1→CN2→CN3→CN4; 7 inter-node segments + 2 termination resistors
Linear bus, same daisy-chain as CAN FD
Belden 3084A equiv, 78Ω; 8-node linear bus; stub transformers on each node
Ring: FC1↔FC2↔FC3↔FC4↔CN1↔CN2↔CN3↔CN4↔FC1; 8 links, RSTP loop prevention
One per FC node Cape-A; routes to panel-mount SMA on hull

payload_system.desc: SG90 servo — cargo clamshell door actuation
payload_system.notes: Driven by CN1/CN3 Cape-B servo headers (PWM via PRU)
Driven by DRV8833 H-bridge on Cape-B

payload_system.desc: Cargo gondola shell + clamshell doors PETG
Auto-latch PETG cradle — engages cargo gondola at dock
payload_system.notes: N52 magnet latch, GPIO release on Cape-B
Winch spool on N20 motor shaft
HX711 ADC on Cape-B; detects cargo presence and weight

obstacle_avoidance.notes: Array A on FC3; omnidirectional coverage — F/R/L/R/U/D
I²C mux for 6× VL53L5CX on shared I²C bus

obstacle_avoidance.desc: MCP23008 I²C GPIO expander — Array A XSHUT control
obstacle_avoidance.notes: Controls VL53L5CX XSHUT pins for sequential init

obstacle_avoidance.desc: VL53L5CX PETG sensor mount + PMMA window
obstacle_avoidance.notes: Flush-mount to hull; PMMA window bonded with UV resin
Array B on FC2; redundant omnidirectional coverage

obstacle_avoidance.desc: MCP23008 I²C GPIO expander — Array B XSHUT control
VL53L5CX PETG sensor mount + PMMA window — Array B

radios_sensors.desc: SiK 915MHz MAVLink telemetry radio module — on Cape-B
radios_sensors.notes: One per Cape-B (CN1–CN4). Software-elected master; all receive simultaneously. SMA belly antennas.

radios_sensors.desc: RFM95W LoRa 915MHz long-range backup radio — on Cape-B
radios_sensors.notes: One per Cape-B. Backup command/low-rate telemetry link. SMA dorsal antennas. Different channel from SiK.

radios_sensors.desc: TI WL1837MOD WiFi 802.11 a/b/g/n (2.4+5GHz) + BT 5.0 — on Cape-B
radios_sensors.notes: One per Cape-B. SDIO interface to AM6232. Uses TI wl18xx mainline Linux driver. GCS AP and BT tablet link.

radios_sensors.desc: RCRS-49 sub-module 49MHz TDDS RC transceiver — plug-in on Cape-B
radios_sensors.notes: One per Cape-B. Plugs into Cape-B JST-GH 6-pin header. Dorsal SMA antenna. Dynamic channel assignment.

radios_sensors.desc: u-blox M10Q GNSS module + L1 patch antenna — on Cape-A
radios_sensors.notes: One per FC node Cape-A (FC1–FC4). 4-constellation L1 GNSS. GPS data broadcast over CAN FD DroneCAN message; FC1 is primary source.

radios_sensors.desc: 915MHz λ/4 SMA monopole whip + RG-316 pigtail
radios_sensors.notes: Belly-mount SMA bulkheads, one per CN node
Dorsal-mount SMA bulkheads, one per CN node; ≥50mm separation from SiK antenna
Dorsal fin SMA mount, one per CN node

radios_sensors.desc: WL1837MOD PCB antenna or U.FL→SMA pigtail
radios_sensors.notes: Dorsal-mount small SMA, one per CN node

fasteners_misc.desc: M2.5 nylon/brass standoffs 8mm — node stacking (PB2 + cape)
3M VHB or foam tape — board mounting in bays

performance.rev_k_delta_notes: Rev K +293g vs Rev J (1884g→2177g) due to 8× PocketBeagle 2 + 4× Cape-A + 4× Cape-B + 4× distributed GPS + 4× additional radio modules. T/W remains >2.0 in all configurations. Max payload reduced from 1046g (RevJ) to 753g (RevK) — still exceeds 250g mission spec by 3×.

canon_geometry.formula: QMx canonical proportions scaled to 457.2mm hull

cargo_bay.gondola_note: Gondola rides in belly bay, retracts flush for transit
cargo_bay.cradle_type: Auto-latch PETG with N52 magnet + GPIO release

obstacle_avoidance_notes.redundancy: Dual independent arrays — Array A on FC3, Array B on FC2
obstacle_avoidance_notes.array_A: FC3 Cape-A I²C ext header → TCA9548A → 6× VL53L5CX (fwd/aft/port/stbd/up/down)
obstacle_avoidance_notes.array_B: FC2 Cape-A I²C ext header → TCA9548A → 6× VL53L5CX (same coverage, independent)

node_placement_rev_k.note: 8-node layout — same hull void-former provisions as RevI 8-node layout
node_placement_rev_k.fc_bay: FC1 + FC2 in nose bay (panel A) and dorsal-fwd bay (panel B); 2 stacks side-by-side per bay
node_placement_rev_k.cn_bay: CN1 + CN2 in dorsal-aft bay (panel D); CN3 + CN4 in aft bay (panel E)
node_placement_rev_k.can_terminators: FC1 (nose) and CN4 (aft) — 120Ω soldered on cape
node_placement_rev_k.rs485_terminators: FC1 and CN4 — 120Ω soldered on cape
node_placement_rev_k.1553_terminators: FC1 and CN4 — 78Ω at bus endpoints; stub transformers on each node
node_placement_rev_k.cg_note: FC nodes (Cape-A, forward) and CN nodes (Cape-B heavier, aft) distribute mass symmetrically. Battery slide ±28mm compensates CG trim. Verify CG with loaded battery before Phase 3 first flight.

total_auw_g.note: Rev K avionics redesign — 8× PocketBeagle 2 with Cape-A + Cape-B
total_auw_g.note_cargo: Max payload 753g at T/W=2.0 with 6S 2800mAh battery. Reduced from RevJ 1046g due to +293g avionics mass. Exceeds 250g mission spec by 3×.

build_notes.access_panels: A(bayonet) B(M2.5) C(hinge) D(magnet) E(M2.5) F(bayonet)

rev_k_cape_notes.shared_bus_section: ATA6561, MAX3485E, DS26LV31/32, PE-68515 xfmr, DP83825I×2 — identical on both capes; consider shared bottom board for NRE reduction
rev_k_cape_notes.tpm_on_both: SLB9670 TPM 2.0 present on both Cape-A and Cape-B. Cape-A TPM: node attestation + flight-key storage. Cape-B TPM: radio key storage + comms session credentials.
rev_k_cape_notes.write_blocker: Cape-B only: ATF16V8BQL CPLD latch gates SD-WP. SET at power-on during boot sequence. CLEAR only on hard power cycle. Same non-executable append-only log semantics as RevJ CPLD write-blocker.
rev_k_cape_notes.ethernet_note: DP83825I PHY assumes CPSW3G RMII available on PB2 P1/P2 headers. Fallback: W5500 SPI (same topology, reduced bandwidth).
rev_k_cape_notes.1553_pru_note: PRU-ICSS Manchester II firmware required. 250 MHz PRU = 250 cycles/µs bit cell. No HI-6130 chip; fully PRU-native.
